positive: A whimsical and stylized celestial forest scene. The composition features ancient, stylized trees with glowing bioluminescent leaves and roots, intertwined with constellations and nebulas. A central, elegant silhouette of a stylized mystical creature (like a griffin or a deer with crystalline antlers) stands peacefully at the heart of the scene. The color palette is deep indigo, vibrant sapphire, glowing emerald green, and soft gold accents. The artistic style should be highly detailed digital illustration, reminiscent of Art Nouveau meets contemporary fantasy graphic design. Strong use of negative space and clean, sharp edges. The lighting is dramatic and ethereal, with light sources emanating from the bioluminescence and celestial bodies. Perfect for a central, repeatable apparel print.
negative: blur, artifacts, extra limbs, bad anatomy, noise, watermark, text, logo, trademark, copyright, messy, low detail, monochrome, out of focus, graffiti, grainy, disfigured
